Materials Genomics Master Todo

Source syllabus: /home/philipp/projects/_teaching/MaterialsGenomics/index.qmd

Planning note: the teaching site is week-based, but execution follows the existing 13-unit slide-deck backbone in this repository.

Shared workflow for every unit

Canonical unit map

Unit Canonical topic Slide-deck folder Unit plan Unit content
1 What is Materials Genomics? 01_intro 01_intro/unit1_plan.md 01_intro/unit1_content_50slides.md
2 Crystal structure fundamentals for data-driven materials discovery 02_crystal_structure_fundamentals 02_crystal_structure_fundamentals/unit2_plan.md 02_crystal_structure_fundamentals/unit2_content_50slides.md
3 Materials databases and thermodynamic quantities 03_materials_databases 03_materials_databases/unit3_plan.md 03_materials_databases/unit3_content_50slides.md
4 From classical descriptors to learned representations 04_classical_descriptors 04_classical_descriptors/unit4_plan.md 04_classical_descriptors/unit4_content_50slides.md
5 Graph-based crystal representations 05_graph_based_rep 05_graph_based_rep/unit5_plan.md 05_graph_based_rep/unit5_content_50slides.md
6 Local atomic environments 06_local_atomic_envs 06_local_atomic_envs/unit6_plan.md 06_local_atomic_envs/unit6_content_50slides.md
7 Regression and generalization in materials data 07_regression_and_generalization_in_materials_data 07_regression_and_generalization_in_materials_data/unit7_plan.md 07_regression_and_generalization_in_materials_data/unit7_content_50slides.md
8 Neural networks for materials properties 08_neural_networks_for_materials_properties 08_neural_networks_for_materials_properties/unit8_plan.md 08_neural_networks_for_materials_properties/unit8_content_50slides.md
9 Representation learning and feature discovery 09_representation_learning_and_feature_discovery 09_representation_learning_and_feature_discovery/unit9_plan.md 09_representation_learning_and_feature_discovery/unit9_content_50slides.md
10 Latent spaces of materials 10_latent_spaces_of_materials 10_latent_spaces_of_materials/unit10_plan.md 10_latent_spaces_of_materials/unit10_content_50slides.md
11 Clustering vs discovery in materials spaces 11_clustering_vs_discovery_in_materials_spaces 11_clustering_vs_discovery_in_materials_spaces/unit11_plan.md 11_clustering_vs_discovery_in_materials_spaces/unit11_content_50slides.md
12 Uncertainty-aware discovery and Gaussian Processes 12_uncertainty_aware_discovery_and_gaussian_processes 12_uncertainty_aware_discovery_and_gaussian_processes/unit12_plan.md 12_uncertainty_aware_discovery_and_gaussian_processes/unit12_content_50slides.md
13 Physical constraints, trust, and integration outlook 13_constraints_trust_and_integration_outlook 13_constraints_trust_and_integration_outlook/unit13_plan.md 13_constraints_trust_and_integration_outlook/unit13_content_50slides.md

Coverage reconciliation notes

  • Syllabus content on simulation methods, atomistic/electronic simulation, and continuum stability is reflected in the early website summaries while the slide-deck execution stays on the canonical 13-unit backbone.
  • The teaching-site summaries remain week-aware; the slide-deck planning and content remain unit-based.

Status key

  • not started
  • in progress
  • done
